backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that manages crypto signal pattern tracking (recording observations and querying scores) with role-based access control, and provides admin-only HTTP outcall fetching and caching of CoinGecko prices.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing four frontend files: the PWA service worker, React Query hooks, Binance auth utilities, and the SearchTab component.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, radius, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the CryptoSMC Pro PWA, setting up viewport meta tags, PWA manifest/icon links, the React root div, and service worker registration.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA web app manifest for CryptoSMC Pro defining app name, icons, display mode, theme colors, and categories for installability.
frontend/public/service-worker.js: PWA service worker implementing cache-first strategy for app shell assets and bypassing interception for external API domains when online, returning a 503 offline error only when the device has no connectivity.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that manages tab navigation state and renders the appropriate tab page (Market, AITrade, Search, Preferences) along with the header, bottom nav, and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/AppHeader.tsx: Sticky app header component displaying the CryptoSMC Pro wordmark and, when authenticated, the user's shortened principal and a logout button.
frontend/src/components/AssetRow.tsx: Presentational component rendering a single crypto asset row with symbol, price, volume, and color-coded percentage change with directional icons.
frontend/src/components/AuthGate.tsx: Wrapper component that shows a login prompt with Internet Identity when the user is unauthenticated, or renders children when authenticated.
frontend/src/components/BottomNav.tsx: Fixed bottom navigation bar with four tabs (Market, AI Trade, Search, Settings) that highlights the active tab with neon styling.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBanner.tsx: Reusable error banner component displaying an alert message with an optional retry button.
frontend/src/components/PositionRow.tsx: Renders a single Binance futures position card showing symbol, direction (long/short), leverage, entry/mark/liquidation prices, and unrealized P&L with alert highlighting when P&L exceeds a threshold.
frontend/src/components/RecommendationCa: Displays an SMC asset analysis card with recommendation label, signal strength bar, signal badges, favorite toggle, and directional trend icon.
frontend/src/components/SignalBadge.tsx: Small badge component that renders a color-coded SMC signal type (OrderBlock, FVG, BOS, CHoCH, LiquidityZone) with direction arrow and optional confidence score.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useFavorites.ts: Hook that manages a persisted list of favorite trading symbols in localStorage, exposing toggle and lookup functions.
frontend/src/hooks/useGlobalLearning.ts: Hooks for reading and writing global pattern scores from the ICP backend canister, including fetching per-symbol pattern entries and recording new signal observations.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, managing AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout, and exposing identity and status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalLearning.ts: Hook wrapping local-learning library functions to record signal observations and retrieve local pattern scores, with a version counter to trigger re-renders on updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for fetching Binance Futures market data (tickers, klines, position risk) and CoinGecko prices via the ICP actor, with appropriate polling intervals.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a dark neon theme with OKLCH CSS custom properties for colors, neon glow effects, and layout utilities.
frontend/src/lib/binance-auth.ts: Provides browser-side Binance Futures API authentication using HMAC-SHA256 signing, with helpers to store/retrieve credentials from localStorage and fetch signed requests including open positions.
frontend/src/lib/local-learning.ts: Manages a localStorage-backed pattern log that tracks signal observations per symbol, recording occurrences and successful preceding moves to compute local reliability scores.
frontend/src/lib/smc-engine.ts: Implements Smart Money Concepts (SMC) technical analysis engine that detects Order Blocks, Fair Value Gaps, Break of Structure, and liquidity zones from OHLCV candle data.
frontend/src/lib/smc-types.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces and types for the SMC analysis system, including OHLCVCandle, SMCSignal, SwingPoint, StructureBreak, and AssetAnalysis.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AITradeTab.tsx: AI trade analysis page that fetches 1H kline data for a whitelisted set of crypto pairs, runs SMC analysis on each, and renders recommendation cards sorted by favorites.
frontend/src/pages/MarketTab.tsx: Market overview page displaying Binance ticker data with search filtering and sorting by volume, price change, or price, along with gainer/loser counts.
frontend/src/pages/PreferencesTab.tsx: React page for user preferences including favorite asset selection, PnL alert toggling, Binance API key management, and local learning data reset with confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/SearchTab.tsx: React page that lets users search a crypto symbol, runs SMC analysis on fetched klines, displays a recommendation card, and shows open Binance futures positions fetched directly from the browser using stored API credentials.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash without a page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a dark-neon theme with oklch-based color tokens, custom neon palette, Space Grotesk/JetBrains Mono fonts, neon glow box shadows, and keyframe animations for accordion, pulse, and slide effects.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot (version 11) describing the architecture, known issues, and feature inventory of a mobile-first crypto PWA with React/TypeScript frontend, ICP Motoko backend, Internet Identity auth, and direct browser-side Binance API calls.
